name: Yasuda Logistics Corporation
summary: Yasuda Logistics Corporation engages in logistics and real estate businesses in Japan. The company provides delivery services and supply chain solutions; and integrated logistics solutions through distribution centers. It also offers medical logistics services comprising logistics for drugs and quasi-drugs, and medical equipment/reagents/diagnostic drugs; and IT equipment logistics services, which include IT equipment kitting and life cycle services, server relocation services, and IT equipment maintenance and logistics services, as well as archiving and office relocation services. In addition, the company provides international transport services, such as ocean transportation, import/export customs clearance, air transportation, overseas logistics, and offshore trade logistics services. Further, it engages in the real estate business that comprise office and residential leasing services; parking services; re-development and renovation of hotels and commercial facilities; and provision of building maintenance services. Additionally, Yasuda Logistics Corporation sells and leases building facilities and transportation equipment. The company was formerly known as The Yasuda Warehouse Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yasuda Logistics Corporation in June 2014. Yasuda Logistics Corporation was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
